How to view, manage and export your scraped data

# How to view, manage and export your scraped data

Tables are where you can manage robot runs and data including quick actions,
bulk actions, and export options. For monitored data, tables become a live
historical database of the data your robot has extracted.

M

Written by Melissa Shires

Updated over 2 months ago

Table of contents

Tables are your operational command center for managing robot runs and your
historical database.

From Tables you can:

  * [View and filter](10594160-how-to-filter-your-data.html) the data you've extracted.

  * Run and trigger automations: [re-run extractions](13196227-how-to-update-and-add-a-row-in-tables.html), [add new URLs](13196227-how-to-update-and-add-a-row-in-tables.html), [trigger bulk operations](10595234-import-csv-for-bulk-data-extraction.html).

  * [Export data](10593816-how-to-export-data-from-tables.html): export your scraped data ([CSV](13179437-how-to-export-your-data-as-a-csv.html), [JSON](13187052-how-to-export-your-data-as-a-json.html), [AWS S3](13187287-how-to-export-your-data-to-aws-s3.html)).

  * Monitor robot performance: track success rates and identify failures.

  * Maintain a [historical database](13178214-working-with-historical-data.html): all data extracted is preserved in tables.

  * Add a [calculated column](13003705-what-are-calculated-columns.html) to transform, enhance, clean or manipulate the data you've extracted.

To access Tables:

  1. Click on any approved robot in your dashboard.

  2. Select **Tables** from the menu at the top.

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1892386985/f574103f184212f58c057c0c52c7/Run%20Task%20Browse%20AI%20%25281%2529.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27Run%2520Task%2520Browse%2520AI%2520%25281%2529f12e.gif?expires=1771547400&signature=36b0022bb6cd9916c83ed9a2ec4a56b2c55ac17f04122bfdeb39fe4935b332a7&req=dSguFMp2m4hXXPMW1HO4zX91WU%2BCSwb7RzrgDmv8Tg2gRhaFrkudTiu9gz2o%0Aqyjckv56vHwtyIdesVo%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1892386985/f574103f184212f58c057c0c52c7/Run%20Task%20Browse%20AI%20%25281%2529.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27Run%2520Task%2520Browse%2520AI%2520%25281%2529f12e.gif?expires=1771547400&signature=36b0022bb6cd9916c83ed9a2ec4a56b2c55ac17f04122bfdeb39fe4935b332a7&req=dSguFMp2m4hXXPMW1HO4zX91WU%2BCSwb7RzrgDmv8Tg2gRhaFrkudTiu9gz2o%0Aqyjckv56vHwtyIdesVo%3D%0A)

💡 Every robot has its own Table so you can view historical runs, export your
data, and set up bulk operations.

⏰ If your robot has a monitor, every time your robot captures new data it will
automatically be added to Tables creating a live historical database of your
extracted data. This is great for audit trails, analyzing historical trends,
and more.

# Viewing your data

Every Table includes a Main tab where you can trigger runs, bulk operations,
and view status details.

## The Main tab

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1881915980/c748ea40a95ec6eaa5cbd4bab49f/Untitled%2bDesign%2bCanva.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27Untitled%2bDesign%2bCanvaa0fe.png?expires=1771547400&signature=451f90cd788cbb6a63ca46c39b41693c639d1037775a652759eb8243396cc11b&req=dSgvF8B%2FmIhXWfMW1HO4zXZi2CeoHyn36Q64wtCr0HwyWkFA0gI6S48v3vPT%0AC5jveGX10XjdXV5A2TU%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1881915980/c748ea40a95ec6eaa5cbd4bab49f/Untitled%2bDesign%2bCanva.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27Untitled%2bDesign%2bCanvaa0fe.png?expires=1771547400&signature=451f90cd788cbb6a63ca46c39b41693c639d1037775a652759eb8243396cc11b&req=dSgvF8B%2FmIhXWfMW1HO4zXZi2CeoHyn36Q64wtCr0HwyWkFA0gI6S48v3vPT%0AC5jveGX10XjdXV5A2TU%3D%0A)

The Main tab provides a summary of each time your robot has run. You will see:

  * Extract date - when the data was extracted

  * Status - status of the extraction (successful, failed, or in-progress)

  * Extraction details including Original URL, and/or input parameter(s)

## Additional tabs

Some tables include additional tabs of data. This depends on the data you've
scraped and how it's structured. You can navigate through the table to view
your data and its structure.

💡 You can only view extracted text, links or HTML in tables. To view
screenshots you need to click on the **History** tab.

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1881911577/fba358e85d1255bebd7f42f07db8/tables-
columns.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27tables-
columns60dd.gif?expires=1771547400&signature=56a65d6fd1d3493c816955bc1bb3121ac81dd9b5e17078a390bacc598c4f5c6d&req=dSgvF8B%2FnIRYXvMW1HO4zQ4YTh9BgmJQF8mEK1mTLrH7xIg%2B4M19eNX6Y3ip%0A5foPUqkD82mgH2noCKw%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1881911577/fba358e85d1255bebd7f42f07db8/tables-
columns.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27tables-
columns60dd.gif?expires=1771547400&signature=56a65d6fd1d3493c816955bc1bb3121ac81dd9b5e17078a390bacc598c4f5c6d&req=dSgvF8B%2FnIRYXvMW1HO4zQ4YTh9BgmJQF8mEK1mTLrH7xIg%2B4M19eNX6Y3ip%0A5foPUqkD82mgH2noCKw%3D%0A)

## Add a Filter

You can add a filer to view your data based on:

  * Input parameter(s), and/or Original URL

  * Status

  * Extract date

  * Bulk run name

📖 Learn more on [how to filter data in a Table](10594160-how-to-filter-your-
data.html).

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1881946720/fee346680cce90a3c21a2f37102c/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image307e.png?expires=1771547400&signature=14663fd3052d183a7de405b8f5dcc5b1e556356b80b86796e36306854b816722&req=dSgvF8B6m4ZdWfMW1HO4zc86D25b3uY3WWHfvMQfEYgQJ4spO%2B84S1J37ITs%0AtFJ6rRqjKU%2BFVY72OY8%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1881946720/fee346680cce90a3c21a2f37102c/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image307e.png?expires=1771547400&signature=14663fd3052d183a7de405b8f5dcc5b1e556356b80b86796e36306854b816722&req=dSgvF8B6m4ZdWfMW1HO4zc86D25b3uY3WWHfvMQfEYgQJ4spO%2B84S1J37ITs%0AtFJ6rRqjKU%2BFVY72OY8%3D%0A)

## Show or hide Historical Data

View the latest data your robot has extracted or view all historical data.

  * ☐ Show Historical Data - see only latest captures

  * ☑ Show Historical Data - view complete archive

📖 Learn more about working with [historical data](13178214-working-with-
historical-data.html) in Tables.

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1881951928/864c9a36f4c316d2a7cdbd5892fc/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image8092.png?expires=1771547400&signature=0d0980d1759819bfa16c9c61d7fd2e91903eb7bd5454b1c4b85890d6b9dd4b75&req=dSgvF8B7nIhdUfMW1HO4zXob8pEkHp2NYo5UFzcmoM4TuuLLYKFbUPujt3v4%0ACDKLB1MnwUbpjK9B%2B8c%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1881951928/864c9a36f4c316d2a7cdbd5892fc/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image8092.png?expires=1771547400&signature=0d0980d1759819bfa16c9c61d7fd2e91903eb7bd5454b1c4b85890d6b9dd4b75&req=dSgvF8B7nIhdUfMW1HO4zXob8pEkHp2NYo5UFzcmoM4TuuLLYKFbUPujt3v4%0ACDKLB1MnwUbpjK9B%2B8c%3D%0A)

## Show or hide columns

Select which columns are displayed by click on the **columns** button.

📖 Learn more about [how to change your visual layout](10595195-how-to-show-
hide-and-resize-table-columns.html) in Tables.

# Run and trigger automations in tables

## Quick actions

From the Main tab you can:

  * Update Row - triggers the robot to 'run' and capture data. 

  * View robot status details - click on the status to view your robot's history. 

  * View data - navigate to view the data your robot has extracted.

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1888416636/c3d7e28a6f20fedc0ca3cbb09ea3/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27imageea68.png?expires=1771547400&signature=5279806292e53ce826c66ceb155a1ce835bcaec05ffde8f0e4686399b7d0db41&req=dSgvHs1%2Fm4dcX%2FMW1HO4za2xPR0nXZnBiTUt0wnv%2F2ca9sFAs4CYjsbz3FpC%0Ae%2BkaKtAwvogoLTOHyeI%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1888416636/c3d7e28a6f20fedc0ca3cbb09ea3/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27imageea68.png?expires=1771547400&signature=5279806292e53ce826c66ceb155a1ce835bcaec05ffde8f0e4686399b7d0db41&req=dSgvHs1%2Fm4dcX%2FMW1HO4za2xPR0nXZnBiTUt0wnv%2F2ca9sFAs4CYjsbz3FpC%0Ae%2BkaKtAwvogoLTOHyeI%3D%0A)

## Add a row to scrape more data

Adding a row will train your robot to extract the same data based on a:

  * [Origin URL](10453064-what-is-the-origin-url.html) \- scrapes the same data on a different URL.

  * [Input parameter](10453929-how-to-set-up-and-use-input-parameters.html) \- extracts the same data based on a different input parameter.

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1879548303/619f8e08eff9bd9d6cbd8ae957ff/Untitled%20%2528Thu%20Dec%2011%202025%2529.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27Untitled%2520%2528Thu%2520Dec%252011%25202025%25296ebb.gif?expires=1771547400&signature=63e915e2f3bc46d5a1024b4f10fde0095a4c6ff31cbb03eb492142ac4cb79374&req=dSggH8x6lYJfWvMW1HO4zb169CFZqQZE6vm%2BeUHKet4lHbms5P9bzOnLTVNR%0ALr9xJaRXo8XwRftUogQ%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1879548303/619f8e08eff9bd9d6cbd8ae957ff/Untitled%20%2528Thu%20Dec%2011%202025%2529.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27Untitled%2520%2528Thu%2520Dec%252011%25202025%25296ebb.gif?expires=1771547400&signature=63e915e2f3bc46d5a1024b4f10fde0095a4c6ff31cbb03eb492142ac4cb79374&req=dSggH8x6lYJfWvMW1HO4zb169CFZqQZE6vm%2BeUHKet4lHbms5P9bzOnLTVNR%0ALr9xJaRXo8XwRftUogQ%3D%0A)

## Import CSV to automatically extract data from up to 50,000 pages

You can add up to 50,000 rows at once by uploading a CSV, this will
automatically scrape or extract data based on a list of input parameters or
Origin URLs.

[![Uploaded
image](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1879552977/143292962166d50c4539cac1166a/601d1e3c-7637-4028-ad6c-582ec2eae76b_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27601d1e3c-7637-4028-ad6c-582ec2eae76b2b4b?expires=1771547400&signature=a83665260acd725f0aca82ef72ca4eeffd53fe61cc8e8d3f3c3af863bd8425ab&req=dSggH8x7n4hYXvMW1HO4zcCRUxnE2VcsG9nxsIXYPXbphpMsJBiVI2Di2byx%0AHmWocD27FD7Ei5mjtc8%3D%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1879552977/143292962166d50c4539cac1166a/601d1e3c-7637-4028-ad6c-582ec2eae76b?expires=1771547400&signature=a83665260acd725f0aca82ef72ca4eeffd53fe61cc8e8d3f3c3af863bd8425ab&req=dSggH8x7n4hYXvMW1HO4zcCRUxnE2VcsG9nxsIXYPXbphpMsJBiVI2Di2byx%0AHmWocD27FD7Ei5mjtc8%3D%0A)

📖 Learn more about [how to run bulk extractions ](10595234-import-csv-for-
bulk-data-extraction.html)in Tables.

# Exporting data

You can export:

  * All of the data your robot has captured (all tabs). 

  * Select data your robot has captured (single tab).

## Exporting all data

You can export all of your data from the Main tab.

  1. Go to the **Main** tab. 

  2. (Optional) Filter the data based on what you'd like to export.

  3. Click the **Export** button.

  4. Choose the export format.

  5. Click **Download** to export the data.

This will extract all of your data into a zipped file that contains one CSV
for the Main tab and one CSV file per captured list.

See**:** [How to export data from a robot's Table](10593816-how-to-export-
data-from-tables.html)

💡 Exports will respect filters that have been added.

💡 If you only want to export the most up to date data, leave **Show historical
data** unchecked, and then click **Export**.

## Exporting a tab

You can export any tab in your Table as CSV or JSON format.

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1888046696/03dd5376fdbc27fef238f5397683/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27imagef8c2.png?expires=1771547400&signature=a6c7a412d259e6334cbfd205000e3ee4fb030d4a43364f216b3dcd6487958f5b&req=dSgvHsl6m4dWX%2FMW1HO4zWE8bYbn%2BXCf%2B8l0QPwbiGIBSDY8yzRbQpFGOu0E%0APp9l3SpQl9rp2L8Lu8Y%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1888046696/03dd5376fdbc27fef238f5397683/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27imagef8c2.png?expires=1771547400&signature=a6c7a412d259e6334cbfd205000e3ee4fb030d4a43364f216b3dcd6487958f5b&req=dSgvHsl6m4dWX%2FMW1HO4zWE8bYbn%2BXCf%2B8l0QPwbiGIBSDY8yzRbQpFGOu0E%0APp9l3SpQl9rp2L8Lu8Y%3D%0A)

  1. Select the tab you want to export.

  2. (Optional) Filter the data based on what you'd like to export.

  3. Click the **Export** button above your Table.

  4. Choose the export format.

  5. Click **Download** to export the data.

The file will be available for immediate download, and you'll also receive an
email with a download link.

# Monitor robot performance

Tables provide real-time visibility into your robot's performance and
extraction success rates.

Every extraction in your Table shows a status indicator:

  * Successful - data was extracted without issues.

  * Failed - the extraction encountered an error.

  * In-progress - The extraction is currently running.

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1888316132/af3d65b3a0f65713446cf67c066b/Robot%20Tables%20Browse%20AI%20%25281%2529.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27Robot%2520Tables%2520Browse%2520AI%2520%25281%25291fd5.gif?expires=1771547400&signature=b4fa3a73f789b3cfab5df80e88fd0c34634235c793257a02243f29fc23350711&req=dSgvHsp%2Fm4BcW%2FMW1HO4zaOvFgDxqx9%2FuzKQ2dWnAXcnUox4mSrlY9QC09yz%0AVtcy6b7RQoGwm2RxaZQ%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1888316132/af3d65b3a0f65713446cf67c066b/Robot%20Tables%20Browse%20AI%20%25281%2529.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27Robot%2520Tables%2520Browse%2520AI%2520%25281%25291fd5.gif?expires=1771547400&signature=b4fa3a73f789b3cfab5df80e88fd0c34634235c793257a02243f29fc23350711&req=dSgvHsp%2Fm4BcW%2FMW1HO4zaOvFgDxqx9%2FuzKQ2dWnAXcnUox4mSrlY9QC09yz%0AVtcy6b7RQoGwm2RxaZQ%3D%0A)

💡 You can filter any table by status to quickly identify failed extractions.

Click on any status to view detailed history for that specific run, including
error messages and troubleshooting information.

# Transform your data with calculated columns

Add calculated columns to transform your extracted data, this is useful for:

  * Cleaning messy data (remove spaces, extract numbers)

  * Creating categories (IF statements for grouping)

  * Performing calculations (add margins, compute totals)

📖 Learn how to [create calculated columns and formulas](13003705-what-are-
calculated-columns.html).

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1898202596/d456e1608577d4ea341b13f44a7c/Edit%2bTables%2bCalculated%2bColumns.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27Edit%2bTables%2bCalculated%2bColumnsfe28.gif?expires=1771547400&signature=dc3d66f820956ca402c05be7627330e31a7946b9a03e1b6547a720bf5d32040d&req=dSguHst%2Bn4RWX%2FMW1HO4zRjVMXrG3N57jJd%2BUZg9ZyI1CDnHSCrPuIEi71dH%0ALE3crJE25hku62abghg%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1898202596/d456e1608577d4ea341b13f44a7c/Edit%2bTables%2bCalculated%2bColumns.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27Edit%2bTables%2bCalculated%2bColumnsfe28.gif?expires=1771547400&signature=dc3d66f820956ca402c05be7627330e31a7946b9a03e1b6547a720bf5d32040d&req=dSguHst%2Bn4RWX%2FMW1HO4zRjVMXrG3N57jJd%2BUZg9ZyI1CDnHSCrPuIEi71dH%0ALE3crJE25hku62abghg%3D%0A)

Capture text: 'From a list' vs. 'Just text'

# Capture text: 'From a list' vs. 'Just text'

Learn when to use "From a list" for repeating data on pages versus "Just text"
to extract and structure specific datapoints.

M

Written by Melissa Shires

Updated over 3 months ago

Table of contents

When training a robot, you'll choose how to extract data based on the
structure of the data on the page, and the structure you'd like it to be in.
There are two main ways that you can scrape text from a web page: **Capture
List** and **Capture Text**.

​**Capture List (i.e. 'From a list')** \- use this when you need to extract
the same type of data that repeats on a page, ex: scraping a list of product
results from a search.

**Capture Text (i.e. 'Just text')** \- use this when you need to extract
specific pieces of data from a page, ex: extracting the name, rating,
description, and price from a product page.

💡 When training a robot to extract data from a web page you can train a single
robot to extract data using both of these methods.

# How to choose between Capture List and Capture Text

Choosing to extract data from a list, or just text will depend on the type of
data you're looking to extract.

| **" From a list"**| **" Just text"**  
---|---|---  
Use when| You see data that repeats in a structured pattern on the page.| You
want to create your own data structure by selecting individual elements.  
Perfect for| • Product lists• Search results• Customer reviews• Directory
listings| • Product titles, descriptions, specifications.• Company information
and contact details.• Article headlines and key features.• Pricing and
availability information.• Any individual text elements  
Key benefits| • Extracts same data fields from each repeating item.• Organizes
data into structured tables.• Includes pagination settings (including infinite
scroll) you configure to extract multiple items.| • Each click creates a
column in your data structure• Creates organized tables when scaled across
pages• You control exactly which elements to extract• Structures data based on
your specific needs  
• Extract dynamic data based on clicks, and drop downs.  
How it works| Identifies repeating patterns and extracts the same data points
from each item in the pattern.| Each click is like creating a column in a
spreadsheet - builds structured dataset you can then scale across multiple
pages.  
  
## Quick decision guide

**Choose Capture List when:**

  * You see multiple similar items repeating on the page

  * You want to extract all items in a list or grid

  * The data naturally appears in a structured, repeating format

  * You need to handle pagination across multiple pages

**Choose Capture Text when:**

  * You want specific individual elements from the page

  * You need to create your own data structure through clicks

  * You want to organize scattered information into columns

* * *

Track your Browse AI usage with the usage report

# Track your Browse AI usage with the usage report

The usage report provides a comprehensive overview of your activity, credit
consumption, and performance metrics.

M

Written by Melissa Shires

Updated over 12 months ago

Table of contents

Use this report to optimize your workflows and manage your Browse AI resources
effectively.

# Accessing the usage report

  1. Navigate to your Browse AI dashboard

  2. Click the credits circle bar icon next to your profile icon in the top-right corner

  3. Select "Detailed usage report" from the dropdown menu

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1367413536/704cf35d0bbf37c426d3cc14186d/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image6c76.png?expires=1771547400&signature=e466847c64421429343e3323c10df661acaa2361ca68a2304cbdece5e0c0e22f&req=dSMhEc1%2FnoRcX%2FMW1HO4zWY%2BSq6H6gdMr9Ya%2B7h7dc4P3V%2FVgug22Ax%2FLhSn%0AisccX3SunAgaj1cxvAc%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1367413536/704cf35d0bbf37c426d3cc14186d/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image6c76.png?expires=1771547400&signature=e466847c64421429343e3323c10df661acaa2361ca68a2304cbdece5e0c0e22f&req=dSMhEc1%2FnoRcX%2FMW1HO4zWY%2BSq6H6gdMr9Ya%2B7h7dc4P3V%2FVgug22Ax%2FLhSn%0AisccX3SunAgaj1cxvAc%3D%0A)

# Understanding the report interface

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1367412856/505bc312b06bb37abfedf8317c4d/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image22a3.png?expires=1771547400&signature=c3f62c77b83044038b902e02e0fda32e0859c0e9f0dfa9d2995564e55fc914cb&req=dSMhEc1%2Fn4laX%2FMW1HO4zcMFzoFditBOduULGUruivJv1wJw4SRH7o8r%2Fjrw%0AWCwGkeCtBg77vhA2K0U%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1367412856/505bc312b06bb37abfedf8317c4d/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image22a3.png?expires=1771547400&signature=c3f62c77b83044038b902e02e0fda32e0859c0e9f0dfa9d2995564e55fc914cb&req=dSMhEc1%2Fn4laX%2FMW1HO4zcMFzoFditBOduULGUruivJv1wJw4SRH7o8r%2Fjrw%0AWCwGkeCtBg77vhA2K0U%3D%0A)

## Report settings (in yellow)

The top section of the report contains essential controls for customizing your
view:

  * Robot selection: Choose "All robots" or select a specific robot to analyze

  * Date range: Set your preferred time period for analysis

  * Apply button: Update the report with your selected filters

## Usage summary (in blue)

The summary section displays key metrics for your selected time period:

  * Total used credits: Number of credits consumed

  * Total tasks: Count of completed robot operations

  * Average success rate: Percentage of successful task completions

  * Total captured rows: Amount of data points extracted

## Usage trends (in green)

The interactive graph visualizes your credit usage over time. Hover over any
point to see detailed metrics including:

  * Daily credit consumption

  * Number of tasks executed

  * Data rows extracted

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1355258775/d5ccd849fc633b949687d26ed1bb/file-f4wfhCjAVG.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27file-f4wfhCjAVG61b5.gif?expires=1771547400&signature=6c6d2c0541d9655e42e969d67e20eebc2684035b086bc41c25d4872a73fa45d0&req=dSMiE8t7lYZYXPMW1HO4zfvcxzDui67Hsj1ZfztUHoysw9N5pbkv0KmvEnw3%0AtF%2BQO1ce%2B7TotZDyWjU%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1355258775/d5ccd849fc633b949687d26ed1bb/file-f4wfhCjAVG.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27file-f4wfhCjAVG61b5.gif?expires=1771547400&signature=6c6d2c0541d9655e42e969d67e20eebc2684035b086bc41c25d4872a73fa45d0&req=dSMiE8t7lYZYXPMW1HO4zfvcxzDui67Hsj1ZfztUHoysw9N5pbkv0KmvEnw3%0AtF%2BQO1ce%2B7TotZDyWjU%3D%0A)

# Robot usage and performance

The detailed performance section shows metrics for each robot:

  * Individual robot credit usage

  * Task completion counts

  * Success rates

  * Historical data for deleted robots

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1355259143/811796de1a6ee0b1025d480d7c10/mCIJ4xZSyBUcVcyZlnip0XBnATllMkZAjZEHmhjoRScO3LvjBmHmghd0Rvcw8HNMmYirAMP1oZKHN0VpQORmM319WeptU2JQpI0DJg54xK-
rDU_rVQSP_2LYUSM?expires=1771547400&signature=9d1ea49cd28e9243ec618a0a2428e21d3793cff5a513b349b7459422f831bfec&req=dSMiE8t7lIBbWvMW1HO4zTK93xpwsDTtRNvZaQz8XigFO%2B9miL3m4GHFwtth%0ARvD3H0rtVIhL6HGn7cc%3D%0A)](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1355259143/811796de1a6ee0b1025d480d7c10/mCIJ4xZSyBUcVcyZlnip0XBnATllMkZAjZEHmhjoRScO3LvjBmHmghd0Rvcw8HNMmYirAMP1oZKHN0VpQORmM319WeptU2JQpI0DJg54xK-
rDU_rVQSP_2LYUSMvVfsQD0f-an3R_m5KmPxFdzRLgQ?expires=1771547400&signature=9d1ea49cd28e9243ec618a0a2428e21d3793cff5a513b349b7459422f831bfec&req=dSMiE8t7lIBbWvMW1HO4zTK93xpwsDTtRNvZaQz8XigFO%2B9miL3m4GHFwtth%0ARvD3H0rtVIhL6HGn7cc%3D%0A)

# How to analyze specific robots

To analyze an individual robot's performance:

  1. Go to the 'Detailed Usage Report'

  2. Click the robot dropdown menu

  3. Select your target robot

  4. Choose your preferred date range

  5. Click apply to update the report

The report will refresh to show detailed metrics for your selected robot,
including success rates, credit usage patterns, and data extraction volumes.

Web crawling vs. web scraping

# Web crawling vs. web scraping

While web crawlers explore and index websites, web scraping extracts specific
data. Learn how Browse AI simplifies targeted data extraction without coding.

M

Written by Melissa Shires

Updated over 12 months ago

Table of contents

Browse AI simplifies web data extraction without coding, allowing you to focus
on using data, not finding it.

####
![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1384495056/8fbcffc2217e866ccd2f39f67133/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image33e3.png?expires=1771632000&signature=a16fd72a36b80c1e7e6783511a6ffecbc43d080d2f1cbbb953c8b55508d267cf&req=dSMvEs13mIFaX%2FMW3Hu4gZORIerw216UA32RT9RyiPFtU5qkpZ93D4FLZwmc%0ALg%3D%3D%0A)
AT A GLANCE

  * Web crawling explores and indexes the web.

  * Web scraping extracts specific data from web pages. 

  * Browse AI is a platform with a feature where you can scrape data from web pages without any coding required.

Whether you're a technical expert managing data operations or a business user
who needs reliable data access, understanding the difference between web
crawling and web scraping will help you choose the right solution for your
needs.

# Understanding web crawling

Web crawling, also known as spidering, systematically explores and indexes the
web. This process primarily serves search engines and web archives by
navigating through websites and following links to discover and index new
pages. Web crawlers create comprehensive maps of website structures and
content, enabling search engines to maintain up-to-date indexes of the
internet.

# How web scraping differs

Web scraping focuses on targeted data extraction from specific web pages.
Unlike crawling's broad exploration, scraping identifies and collects
particular information such as product details, pricing information, or market
research data. This precise approach transforms web content into structured,
analyzable data that drives business decisions and insights.

Browse AI's approach to web scraping

Browse AI specializes in web scraping, providing a no-code solution for
extracting specific data from target websites. Our platform helps technical
teams centralize data operations while enabling business users to access the
data they need without technical complexity.

Our approach delivers several key advantages:

### Web scraping without coding expertise

Train robots through our intuitive interface by simply showing them which data
to extract. This makes data extraction accessible to both technical and non-
technical users.

### Targeted data monitoring

Set up automatic monitoring for specific data points, receiving alerts when
important information changes. This ensures you always have the most current
market intelligence and competitive insights.

### Reliable data extraction

Our AI-powered engine maintains accurate extraction even when websites update
their structure, while our deep scraping capabilities enable comprehensive
data collection across multiple pages.

## Why each website needs its own robot

Websites use different structures to present their data, which is why Browse
AI creates specialized robots for each site. While this means training
separate robots for different websites, our intuitive interface makes the
process quick and straightforward. Once trained, robots can be reused across
pages with identical structures, streamlining your data extraction workflow.

Your robot's specialized training ensures consistent, accurate data extraction
tailored to each website's unique characteristics. This approach delivers more
reliable results than attempting to use a one-size-fits-all solution across
different web structures.

## Getting started with Browse AI

Ready to start extracting web data? Our platform helps you transform complex
web data into actionable insights without writing code. Check out our guides
on building your first robot or contact our team to discuss your specific data
extraction needs.

Do I need to train a robot for each web page?

# Do I need to train a robot for each web page?

No – one robot can extract data from unlimited pages with the same structure.

M

Written by Melissa Shires

Updated over 3 months ago

Table of contents

## How robots recognize patterns

When you train a robot on one page (like a product listing), it learns the
structure of that page type. You can then run that same robot on thousands of
similar pages without retraining.

For example, one robot trained on an Amazon product page can extract data from
**any** Amazon product page – whether it's electronics, books, or clothing.

## When to reuse your existing robot

Use the same robot when pages share the same layout:

  * All product pages on an e-commerce site

  * All company profiles in a business directory

  * All property listings on a real estate site

  * All job postings on a job board

💡 Change the [Origin URL](10453064-what-is-the-origin-url.html) in your
robot's "Run Task" tab to extract from different pages instantly. Or use [Bulk
Run](10477518-bulk-run-how-to-execute-bulk-tasks.html) to process thousands of
URLs at once.

## When you need a new robot

Create a new robot when the page structure is different:

  * Switching between websites (Amazon vs. eBay)

  * Different page types on the same site (product page vs. search results)

  * Major layout changes after a site redesign

What are batched failure email notifications?

# What are batched failure email notifications?

Get organized insights on robot failures with email digests that consolidate
error notifications and help you manage tasks efficiently.

M

Written by Melissa Shires

Updated over 12 months ago

Table of contents

Browse AI's batched notification system helps you efficiently manage and
respond to robot failures through organized email digests. These digests
provide comprehensive insights about your robots' performance and help you
take action when needed.

# How batched notifications work

## Email content

Each digest includes:

  * A summary of all robot failures within your chosen timeframe

  * Success rates for each affected robot

  * Direct links to improve robot performance

  * Actionable recommendations for common issues

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1379842007/0fe700edb958eea070a6d643a800/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image27b3.png?expires=1771547400&signature=8264f549fd47abd54ab6e3893e18bc40331d0c613fd3d53b02909520706577d2&req=dSMgH8F6n4FfXvMW1HO4zYhFtDprhUWB2EE8yT1I%2F4rlYEx%2BLSmEg34cCigE%0ADzTYdJQiRlEO%2Bp0K3Wg%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1379842007/0fe700edb958eea070a6d643a800/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image27b3.png?expires=1771547400&signature=8264f549fd47abd54ab6e3893e18bc40331d0c613fd3d53b02909520706577d2&req=dSMgH8F6n4FfXvMW1HO4zYhFtDprhUWB2EE8yT1I%2F4rlYEx%2BLSmEg34cCigE%0ADzTYdJQiRlEO%2Bp0K3Wg%3D%0A)

## Notification frequencies

Choose how often you receive failure notifications:

  * **Instantly:** Receive individual notifications for each failure

  * **Daily:** Get a summary of failures from the past 24 hours

  * **Weekly:** Receive a weekly digest of all failures

  * **Monthly:** Get a comprehensive monthly report

  * **Never:** Turn off failure notifications

To adjust your notification preferences:

  1. Log into your Browse AI dashboard

  2. Navigate to Settings > Notifications

  3. Select your preferred frequency under "Failure Notifications"

  4. Click Save to apply your changes

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1379842466/40e77dcece18c86117707cb76a34/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27imagef8d8.png?expires=1771547400&signature=17acf17fdeda9e46b72d3ef09d42c66e12e82834c773533953ea1ea0cb218c35&req=dSMgH8F6n4VZX%2FMW1HO4zRqJ0svBk9PBMPXJweNATBZGD7Ja0cDynZsmTadv%0AMesVMo6sqwaOTeEK7M8%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1379842466/40e77dcece18c86117707cb76a34/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27imagef8d8.png?expires=1771547400&signature=17acf17fdeda9e46b72d3ef09d42c66e12e82834c773533953ea1ea0cb218c35&req=dSMgH8F6n4VZX%2FMW1HO4zRqJ0svBk9PBMPXJweNATBZGD7Ja0cDynZsmTadv%0AMesVMo6sqwaOTeEK7M8%3D%0A)

## Default settings

#### New users:

  * Start with instant notifications by default

  * Automatically switch to weekly digests if system detects high volume (12+ failures per month)

#### Existing users:

  * Those receiving high-volume failure emails (12+ per month) will use weekly digests

  * You can adjust your preferences anytime through the dashboard

What does Browse AI do?

# What does Browse AI do?

Automatically extract and monitor web data in minutes with no coding required.

M

Written by Melissa Shires

Updated over 6 months ago

Table of contents

## What is Browse AI?

Browse AI is an AI-powered data extraction and monitoring platform trusted by
over 500,000 users worldwide. Our no-code solution allows you to train robots
in minutes to scrape, monitor, and automate data extraction from any website,
handling billions of data records reliably and securely.

#
![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1356893504/816e918a14cdb8b0b5173d1b306a/database-
import-stroke-rounded.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27database-import-stroke-
rounded8cbd.png?expires=1771632000&signature=b7a134cfa05709bdc12368ffa9198b3c05d4e14d727d76f9bafaeb8da5ae895a&req=dSMiEMF3noRfXfMW3Hu4gSDhJ5%2BfcvWOcoZBxHQnAzauEefTYNkW3KTtH%2BKL%0A7g%3D%3D%0A)
Automate data extraction

Whether you're a technical expert managing data operations or a business user
who needs reliable data for daily operations, Browse AI streamlines your web
data extraction process.

## **Data extraction**

Extract any data you need from any website, including product information,
real estate listings, social media data, financial data, and lead generation
details.

Our AI-powered engine ensures accurate extraction even when websites change,
while our deep scraping capabilities allow you to gather comprehensive
datasets across multiple pages.

## **Live data monitoring**

Set up automated monitoring to track changes on any website. Receive instant
alerts when prices update, new products launch, or important information
changes.

Our geolocation-based extraction ensures you get accurate data from any
region.

## Seamless integrations

Connect Browse AI with over 7,000 apps and tools to transform web data into a
live data pipeline in minutes.

![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1379676118/ce3e32decd214709181c4b32fb60/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image5065.png?expires=1771632000&signature=b305ec16159924db2ed33b9d234e10709ba8adf29e0d0a5d591d82e9bacfecdd&req=dSMgH895m4BeUfMW3Hu4ga9gQ5L7iKqrJKGuFflcopcU7Rd8YzogNkTB8UEB%0AzQ%3D%3D%0A)
**See:**[Integrations](https://www.browse.ai/integrations)

  
​

#

design-02-stroke-rounded.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27web-
design-02-stroke-
roundedb5c6.png?expires=1771632000&signature=5c0dd0a518883b885eb1f4d64a41815aed2f938cd0603da416d1f46dad706bd2&req=dSMiEMF3nYhaXfMW3Hu4gZQYEVuEYBHSzsg67VIDSEvTFB0cym%2BNHxCu77yg%0AjA%3D%3D%0A)
Transform websites into APIs

Transform any website into an API endpoint, making it simple to incorporate
web data into your existing workflows and applications.

![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1379676118/ce3e32decd214709181c4b32fb60/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image5065.png?expires=1771632000&signature=b305ec16159924db2ed33b9d234e10709ba8adf29e0d0a5d591d82e9bacfecdd&req=dSMgH895m4BeUfMW3Hu4ga9gQ5L7iKqrJKGuFflcopcU7Rd8YzogNkTB8UEB%0AzQ%3D%3D%0A)

Save time and resources

Our AI-powered platform can reliably extract data at scale, speed, and at a
lower cost.

We were designed to extract billions of rows of data accurately with AI-change
detection, automated retries, proxy management, rate limiting and more.

#
![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1356895749/ba9bcb58c72c66bb344f3f8885b9/tick-

Gain a competitive edge

With Browse AI, you'll be empowered to:

  * Gain insights into your competitors' strategies and offerings.

  * Track market trends and identify emerging opportunities.

  * Make data-driven decisions to stay ahead of the curve.

  * … and more!

#
![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1356897737/1c76f54c84b18a2df0d12664e497/user-

roundedb1e0.png?expires=1771632000&signature=de77dba6fcd77716e813a9f00308ff972b7f6c91af979b6f165cfb769173fedd&req=dSMiEMF3moZcXvMW3Hu4gbUE2hDtS24Tg3AdgRWRi028mIAN7awhctcaXcAJ%0ACA%3D%3D%0A)
Who can benefit from Browse AI?

Our platform serves diverse needs across industries. Technical teams use
Browse AI to centralize data operations and ensure reliable data delivery at
scale. Business users rely on our platform for stress-free data extraction
that integrates seamlessly with their existing tools and processes.

Common applications include:

  * Comprehensive market and competitor analysis

  * Real-time price and inventory monitoring

  * Lead generation and sales intelligence

  * Financial data aggregation and analysis

  * Research and academic data collection

for Browse AI.

Does Browse AI have a white label option?

# Does Browse AI have a white label option?

No, Browse AI doesn't offer white labeling. However, we provide two
alternatives to help you integrate Browse AI's platform into your business.

M

Written by Melissa Shires

Updated over 12 months ago

Table of contents

# API integration

Our API lets you build Browse AI's data extraction capabilities directly into
your own applications. This means you can:

  * Create and manage robots programmatically

  * Schedule data extraction runs

  * Retrieve data in your preferred format

Visit our [API documentation](https://www.browse.ai/docs/api/v2) to learn
more.

# Managed services

With managed services, our team handles all aspects of your data extraction
needs.

We offer fully managed data scraping, monitoring, transformation, and
management:

  * Design and build custom robots for your specific requirements

  * Manage the entire extraction process from setup to delivery

  * Monitor and maintain robots to ensure reliable data collection

  * Integrate the extracted data with your existing systems

  * Provide ongoing technical support

This service works well when you want to:

  * Outsource the technical complexity of web scraping

  * Scale your data extraction without managing infrastructure

  * Focus your team on core business activities

You can learn more about our managed services
[here](https://www.browse.ai/premium).

##

How Browse AI uses AI?

# How Browse AI uses AI?

Browse AI uses artificial intelligence to make web data extraction reliable,
accurate, and easy to use - no technical expertise required.

M

Written by Melissa Shires

Updated over 5 months ago

Table of contents

# Key AI capabilities

## Web change detection and adaptation

Websites change frequently - they update their layouts, add new elements, or
modify their structure.

In traditional web scraping this is where scrapers break and why it's costly
to scale, and data becomes unreliable.

Our AI automatically detects and adapts to these changes, ensuring your data
extraction continues to work without interruption. It also lets you know about
the change, and how it adapted the scraper.

This means you don't need to constantly update or fix your robots. This also
means that you can scale your data extraction without hiring more humans to
monitor and adapt your web scrapers.

## Human-like behavior

Our AI helps robots act like real people when visiting websites. They can:

  * Scroll through pages naturally

  * Click on buttons and links

  * Fill out forms

  * Handle security checks (like captchas)

  * Navigate complex web pages

This natural behavior ensures reliable data extraction and helps your robots
work consistently across different websites.

They are also built with no coding required with our point and click
interface. No python, no lines, of code, just point, click and create.

## Smart robot creation

When you're creating a new robot, our AI helps by:

  * Suggesting the most relevant data to extract based on your needs

  * Highlighting important elements on the page

  * Providing guidance during the training process

## Reliability you can count on

Our AI technology ensures that your data extraction is reliable and always
running by learning and adapting. This includes:

  * Automatic retries

  * Rate limiting and scaling

  * AI-powered change monitoring

  * Alert detection

  * Proxy management

  * ...and more.

* * *

How to add email/password login to your Google account

# How to add email/password login to your Google account

Add an email/password login option to your Google-connected Browse AI account
without losing your existing login method.

M

Written by Melissa Shires

Updated over 12 months ago

Table of contents

If you signed up on Browse AI using your Google account (aka SSO) and you want
to log in with a password instead, you can follow these simple steps to be
able to log in using either method.

## Steps to add email/password login

  1. Log out of your Browse AI account

  2. Visit the signup page

  3. Sign up using **the same email address you use for Google login**

  4. Click "Send verification email" in the confirmation window

  5. Open the verification email and click the authorization link

Once completed, you can log in using either your Google account or
email/password.

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1380826488/38a0d90ff8c5f935af98ae0915cd/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27imagef8dd.png?expires=1771547400&signature=8ca76924e4be3c71b711e64c9762225615912a6068aa9de87c1a527ec7aa76d4&req=dSMvFsF8m4VXUfMW1HO4zcvppolhERKfRDKcX4lyiC4XV9zQnOqp0m8vHtpE%0Ay4XI8cn0O7EEtfES0N4%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1380826488/38a0d90ff8c5f935af98ae0915cd/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27imagef8dd.png?expires=1771547400&signature=8ca76924e4be3c71b711e64c9762225615912a6068aa9de87c1a527ec7aa76d4&req=dSMvFsF8m4VXUfMW1HO4zcvppolhERKfRDKcX4lyiC4XV9zQnOqp0m8vHtpE%0Ay4XI8cn0O7EEtfES0N4%3D%0A)

## Troubleshooting

  * Didn't receive the verification email? Check your spam folder or click "Resend verification email"

  * Make sure to use exactly the same email address as your Google login

  * Having issues? Contact our support team

How to change your Browse AI password

# How to change your Browse AI password

Reset your Browse AI password through the forgot password feature, or learn
why Google sign-in users manage passwords differently.

M

Written by Melissa Shires

Updated over 12 months ago

Table of contents

#### How do I change my password if I've signed up using my Google account?

If you signed up using Google, you'll need to manage your password through
your Google account settings instead.

## Before you begin

  * You'll need access to your email account

  * You must be signed out of Browse AI

## Steps to change your password

  1. Go to the Browse AI login page

  2. Click "Forgot password?"

  3. Enter your email address and click "Continue"

  4. Check your email inbox for a password reset link

  5. Click the "Confirm" button in the email

  6. Enter and confirm your new password

  7. Click "Reset password"

  8. Log in with your new password

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1380822824/fd8a71200a6188b5630d2dad21b8/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image18c1.png?expires=1771547400&signature=1308168855cfe94d131c9d1fb6aa1dd883174f48ca793a899512179a8a73b648&req=dSMvFsF8n4ldXfMW1HO4zdqi7dO6g7srePsIrCbk6mHrmFcOI%2F6uWWugsr3D%0AgMLxW7XMbQVkmZafj%2FI%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1380822824/fd8a71200a6188b5630d2dad21b8/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image18c1.png?expires=1771547400&signature=1308168855cfe94d131c9d1fb6aa1dd883174f48ca793a899512179a8a73b648&req=dSMvFsF8n4ldXfMW1HO4zdqi7dO6g7srePsIrCbk6mHrmFcOI%2F6uWWugsr3D%0AgMLxW7XMbQVkmZafj%2FI%3D%0A)

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1380823595/b5cac02858da86edf28537660a93/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image9ee1.png?expires=1771547400&signature=b5dedf3317c978becc5aef2f8ff851a30d65c992917e9e3f2bfc0943d23691a5&req=dSMvFsF8noRWXPMW1HO4zXxrIgi0lPIc8MuWOUhST8YwfHT9LCeL%2BVvcIVYd%0AJyUZvGbnnI%2Bj28WcMSg%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1380823595/b5cac02858da86edf28537660a93/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image9ee1.png?expires=1771547400&signature=b5dedf3317c978becc5aef2f8ff851a30d65c992917e9e3f2bfc0943d23691a5&req=dSMvFsF8noRWXPMW1HO4zXxrIgi0lPIc8MuWOUhST8YwfHT9LCeL%2BVvcIVYd%0AJyUZvGbnnI%2Bj28WcMSg%3D%0A)

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1380824113/4146671107878f7a6946c2ebb184/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image8c9f.png?expires=1771547400&signature=7220727ac37678dc3179c2d6e9f1b5755a74298c08dd8f925468a2f553f4fb77&req=dSMvFsF8mYBeWvMW1HO4zSHpawY1uOsVo0k%2F9jnLmOwD4G4OHSKhHsJGXW6Z%0AXSGklqJixx2k8zDkHa8%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1380824113/4146671107878f7a6946c2ebb184/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image8c9f.png?expires=1771547400&signature=7220727ac37678dc3179c2d6e9f1b5755a74298c08dd8f925468a2f553f4fb77&req=dSMvFsF8mYBeWvMW1HO4zSHpawY1uOsVo0k%2F9jnLmOwD4G4OHSKhHsJGXW6Z%0AXSGklqJixx2k8zDkHa8%3D%0A)

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1380824706/9788beec1118fc31424c966071bd/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image2613.png?expires=1771547400&signature=4a17f66b240c4e80eeb59e64b58abcba48c79df24112461a4c94c5a6505fe426&req=dSMvFsF8mYZfX%2FMW1HO4zRQRdS4Y%2B9qs9OYwQGugifPYxYtOzo3L7ZkgUer1%0ADDyY46aQthdfp5LMX9g%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1380824706/9788beec1118fc31424c966071bd/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image2613.png?expires=1771547400&signature=4a17f66b240c4e80eeb59e64b58abcba48c79df24112461a4c94c5a6505fe426&req=dSMvFsF8mYZfX%2FMW1HO4zRQRdS4Y%2B9qs9OYwQGugifPYxYtOzo3L7ZkgUer1%0ADDyY46aQthdfp5LMX9g%3D%0A)

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1380825054/5d826c850f57ce8dd73a7cf94147/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image29e8.png?expires=1771547400&signature=6e88c3750248ae59b6ca8281a66b338bffbf6f83eb84a3bac6ffd3b6d828e231&req=dSMvFsF8mIFaXfMW1HO4zaj6jkPddpLNNLgScGYzItvI29TI60oUUKGcLK%2F2%0Atx%2BoiYJw0ADKw5EQtLQ%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1380825054/5d826c850f57ce8dd73a7cf94147/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image29e8.png?expires=1771547400&signature=6e88c3750248ae59b6ca8281a66b338bffbf6f83eb84a3bac6ffd3b6d828e231&req=dSMvFsF8mIFaXfMW1HO4zaj6jkPddpLNNLgScGYzItvI29TI60oUUKGcLK%2F2%0Atx%2BoiYJw0ADKw5EQtLQ%3D%0A)

## Troubleshooting

  * Didn't receive the reset email? Check your spam folder or click "Resend email"

  * Reset link expired? Start the process again from step 1

  * Need additional help? Contact our support team

How to use workspaces

# How to use workspaces

Organize and manage your robots in shared team environments with Workspaces.

M

Written by Melissa Shires

Updated over 9 months ago

Table of contents

A workspace is a shared environment where teams collaborate on robots and
manage data extraction projects. Each workspace has its own dashboard,
settings, and team members.

# Creating a workspace

  1. Click the workspace dropdown menu in the top-left corner of your dashboard

  2. Select "\+ Create new workspace"

  3. Enter a unique name for your workspace

  4. Click "Confirm" to create the workspace

**NOTE:** While creating workspaces is free, you'll need a paid plan to use
robots in any workspace beyond your default workspace.

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1543514129/1adff71483eb136f6a1e68b3b22a/CleanShot%202025-05-27%20at%2011.18.15.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27CleanShot%25202025-05-27%2520at%252011.18.15c0cc.png?expires=1771547400&signature=1b6c500d8c81ccbc07e24a4cad9d821aa451433469a1da71a0d8ad0d78161f07&req=dSUjFcx%2FmYBdUPMW1HO4zUwIk1MGjM9y6SiOwa%2FpdnZ9WkLh3Y0coB%2B7kkqu%0ANgMMwLwIi1PSsR%2BjX8A%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1543514129/1adff71483eb136f6a1e68b3b22a/CleanShot%202025-05-27%20at%2011.18.15.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27CleanShot%25202025-05-27%2520at%252011.18.15c0cc.png?expires=1771547400&signature=1b6c500d8c81ccbc07e24a4cad9d821aa451433469a1da71a0d8ad0d78161f07&req=dSUjFcx%2FmYBdUPMW1HO4zUwIk1MGjM9y6SiOwa%2FpdnZ9WkLh3Y0coB%2B7kkqu%0ANgMMwLwIi1PSsR%2BjX8A%3D%0A)

**Note:** As seen above, workspaces you belong to will be sorted
alphabetically in the dropdown. There is currently no way to change that
behaviour.

# Understanding workspace roles

Workspace roles determine what actions members can take:

#### Owner:

  * Full control over workspace settings

  * Manage members and permissions

  * Transfer ownership

  * Access all robots and API settings

#### Admin:

  * Manage workspace settings

  * Add or remove members

  * Configure robots and API settings

  * Cannot transfer ownership

#### Member:

  * Build and run robots

  * Access shared workspace data

  * Cannot modify workspace settings

  * Cannot add new members 

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1380829924/aa956ae4f57d9271d69d13bec69a/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27imagec03a.png?expires=1771547400&signature=7a6d54469ce8bf7a57b18891cfef52533f7586bc2cd98f202693b7048b08f479&req=dSMvFsF8lIhdXfMW1HO4zbTRr4edoHqwilc7EicCcFBhzWM0aQZkuJZB9WrF%0AHV72YjXcNLNWEDbd7c8%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1380829924/aa956ae4f57d9271d69d13bec69a/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27imagec03a.png?expires=1771547400&signature=7a6d54469ce8bf7a57b18891cfef52533f7586bc2cd98f202693b7048b08f479&req=dSMvFsF8lIhdXfMW1HO4zbTRr4edoHqwilc7EicCcFBhzWM0aQZkuJZB9WrF%0AHV72YjXcNLNWEDbd7c8%3D%0A)

**NOTE:** Before accepting the invitation, the new team member must have a
Browse AI account linked to their email address.

Users with the `Member` role in free plan workspaces do not see subscription
plans, as only `Admins` and `Owners` can manage subscriptions.

# Workspace limitations

#### Default workspace:

  * Included with every account

  * Includes 50 free credits

  * Cannot add team members

#### Team member access:

  * All Browse AI plans can invite team members

  * Free and Personal plans can have 3 team members

  * Professional plan can have 10 team members

  * Premium plan can have custom number of team members

# Managing workspace settings

Access workspace settings to:

  * Transfer ownership

  * Update workspace name

  * Manage team members

  * Configure billing preferences

  * Set up API access

  * Monitor credit usage  
​

# Ownership transfer

The workspace owner can designate a new owner and transfer ownership to
another team member. Here’s how you can do it:

  * In the Workspace Settings, click on the pen icon

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1524928924/1fe34b766eeb58f71d01ebd90f3d/Screenshot%202025-05-14%20at%2018.37.42%20copy%202.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27Screenshot%25202025-05-14%2520at%252018.37.42%2520copy%252021315.png?expires=1771547400&signature=849afa62e81243d56517a71dea96cfab471499d37d6a137be6724d42f9c5736b&req=dSUlEsB8lYhdXfMW1HO4zZEkcoY49LYlRmWL%2Fg45T9jvkLcL0yjMGDpfQJDp%0A%2Fvjh%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1524928924/1fe34b766eeb58f71d01ebd90f3d/Screenshot%202025-05-14%20at%2018.37.42%20copy%202.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27Screenshot%25202025-05-14%2520at%252018.37.42%2520copy%252021315.png?expires=1771547400&signature=849afa62e81243d56517a71dea96cfab471499d37d6a137be6724d42f9c5736b&req=dSUlEsB8lYhdXfMW1HO4zZEkcoY49LYlRmWL%2Fg45T9jvkLcL0yjMGDpfQJDp%0A%2Fvjh%0A)

  * Choose the Owner role for the selected team member.

  * Click on "Save"

  * Then, click on "Yes, transfer ownership"

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1524931625/00c15c3fc20712dc8b687c81e8ec/Screenshot%202025-05-14%20at%2018.45.48.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27Screenshot%25202025-05-14%2520at%252018.45.481ba5.png?expires=1771547400&signature=fe6603e774edbd7d11a90d9eb06f9d7083ba7d325166fc4ef52df658d80a9934&req=dSUlEsB9nIddXPMW1HO4zUj4i34s0CfNawImsyYLPfFR485cjY4xixH7iISx%0AcGt%2B%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1524931625/00c15c3fc20712dc8b687c81e8ec/Screenshot%202025-05-14%20at%2018.45.48.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27Screenshot%25202025-05-14%2520at%252018.45.481ba5.png?expires=1771547400&signature=fe6603e774edbd7d11a90d9eb06f9d7083ba7d325166fc4ef52df658d80a9934&req=dSUlEsB9nIddXPMW1HO4zUj4i34s0CfNawImsyYLPfFR485cjY4xixH7iISx%0AcGt%2B%0A)

  * Congrats! Your workspace now has a new owner!

* * *

How to switch between workspaces

# How to switch between workspaces

Click the workspace name in the top-left corner of your dashboard to switch
between different workspaces.

M

Written by Melissa Shires

Updated over 12 months ago

Table of contents

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1380832553/463735cbe3e0a1a3ce87a014e3e3/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image0f24.png?expires=1771547400&signature=0afa3ea529db3e3d6fa93d687d7b27c83bab295ae92489119f42735e703bb471&req=dSMvFsF9n4RaWvMW1HO4zXTQXHyj0%2FVPMW6DPesLsgJgecF2blUgD%2BWlLxd9%0AnSn8%2BfIImMbGxXLzJtc%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1380832553/463735cbe3e0a1a3ce87a014e3e3/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image0f24.png?expires=1771547400&signature=0afa3ea529db3e3d6fa93d687d7b27c83bab295ae92489119f42735e703bb471&req=dSMvFsF9n4RaWvMW1HO4zXTQXHyj0%2FVPMW6DPesLsgJgecF2blUgD%2BWlLxd9%0AnSn8%2BfIImMbGxXLzJtc%3D%0A)

# Quick steps to switch workspaces

  1. Look for your current workspace name in the top-left corner of your dashboard

  2. Click on the workspace name to open the workspace menu

  3. Select the workspace you want to switch to

Your new workspace will load immediately, giving you access to all its robots,
tasks, and settings.

# Managing your workspace settings

Once you're in your workspace, you can:

## Change your workspace name

  1. Go to Workspace Settings

  2. Edit the workspace name

  3. Click Update to save

## Invite team members

  1. Click the "Invite teammate" button

  2. Enter their email address

  3. Select their role (Member or Admin)

## Understanding workspace roles

### Workspace owners can:

  * Manage team member access

  * Edit workspace settings

  * Control notification preferences

  * Update billing information

### Team members can:

  * Access shared robots

  * View workspace data

  * Receive notifications based on their settings

# Troubleshooting

Can't see a workspace? Make sure:

  * You've accepted the workspace invitation

  * Your account email matches the invitation email

  * You're logged into the correct Browse AI account

* * *

How to build a robot using the Chrome extension

# How to build a robot using the Chrome extension

Learn how to build a robot using the Chrome extension to capture structured
data or monitor website changes in just a few simple steps.

M

Written by Melissa Shires

Updated over 3 months ago

Table of contents

⚠️ The Browse AI Chrome extension has been depreciated. For the best
experience, it is recommended to create web scraping and monitoring robots is
using [Robot Studio](10496382-how-to-train-a-robot-to-scrape-or-monitor-
data.html).

#
![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1360224770/ac8dfae0756d90c7829ef82286ec/icon-
vid-play.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27icon-vid-
playa3c4.png?expires=1771632000&signature=0dcb60b85fb14024b7ef3cda249428e9200ac32425aa3cb74cd182694e2a638d&req=dSMhFst8mYZYWfMW3Hu4gShGXK5I3VEBp9N5C5KIjj4n88nDEpHYmL3OLb5o%0AgQ%3D%3D%0A)
Watch & learn

* * *

#
![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1360225453/9e5ea8055a99cefcf1975a3aa212/icon-
full-guide.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27icon-full-
guide53da.png?expires=1771632000&signature=3eb9b5cb08bd9566c4837d8b1a9e3fb2a89b1321828bc6a5bf5a7b1a83e94d51&req=dSMhFst8mIVaWvMW3Hu4gcvJDCzCq48MVj7DARaq%2F8NRnEcFNAJHh53sYBak%0A%2Fg%3D%3D%0A)
Full guide

* * *

## What you'll need

  * A Browse AI account

  * Google Chrome browser

  * Browse AI Chrome extension (we'll help you install it if you don't have it yet)

## Step 1: Start building your robot

  1. Log into your Browse AI dashboard.

  2. Click the **Build New Robot** button in the top right corner.

  3. Choose between two options:

    1. **Extract structured data** : best for one-time extractions or infrequent use.

    2. **Monitor site changes** : ideal for regular tracking (daily/hourly) of website updates.

If you're not sure which option to choose we recommend selecting **Extract
Structured Data**. You can always add monitoring to any robot as a later step.

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1384568290/60ab64356ec5b000c036c8c2771f/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image8b5d.png?expires=1771547400&signature=421c7c18b2266706879710630945db93d9124c67d1ef01092b86e33a9f87dfa1&req=dSMvEsx4lYNWWfMW1HO4zcwEQFwt5oueuH%2F4H7ExBZT78%2BsnAbq18qAHJmso%0AwKwcD7STllsbsr9o%2FDE%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1384568290/60ab64356ec5b000c036c8c2771f/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image8b5d.png?expires=1771547400&signature=421c7c18b2266706879710630945db93d9124c67d1ef01092b86e33a9f87dfa1&req=dSMvEsx4lYNWWfMW1HO4zcwEQFwt5oueuH%2F4H7ExBZT78%2BsnAbq18qAHJmso%0AwKwcD7STllsbsr9o%2FDE%3D%0A)

## Step 2: Enter your target website

  1. Enter the complete URL of the webpage you want to extract data from (we call this your **Original URL**).

  2. Click **Start Training Robot.**

  3. Select **Use Chrome Extension**.

For example, we'll use Product Hunt's homepage to demonstrate extracting the
top products.

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1384568554/82d77fecb5942b679eee14e69345/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27imaged915.png?expires=1771547400&signature=d45641f7911199dd94ed88fb845a8e8ce047824cabaf71b661d9d2c23f6f5e12&req=dSMvEsx4lYRaXfMW1HO4zeUPEQq5oBm%2BvuFEw1kh9SMugiIMkFZF53Wb1OAL%0AO57ycrb0m%2FnI9efcqCM%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1384568554/82d77fecb5942b679eee14e69345/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27imaged915.png?expires=1771547400&signature=d45641f7911199dd94ed88fb845a8e8ce047824cabaf71b661d9d2c23f6f5e12&req=dSMvEsx4lYRaXfMW1HO4zeUPEQq5oBm%2BvuFEw1kh9SMugiIMkFZF53Wb1OAL%0AO57ycrb0m%2FnI9efcqCM%3D%0A)

## Step 3: Install the Chrome extension (first-time users)

If this is your first time creating a robot, you'll be prompted to install the
Browse AI Chrome extension:

  1. Follow the Chrome prompts to add the extension.

  2. Update your Chrome security settings following the add-on prompts as needed.

  3. The training mode will automatically begin once installation is complete.

If this is the first time you are training a robot, you will be prompted to
install the Browse AI Extension when you click on **Use Chrome Extension**.

Check out this brief video to see the entire process:

## Step 4: Choose your capture method

To begin capturing data:

  1. Click on the robot icon that appears on the page.

  2. Choose one of three options:

     * **Capture List** : extract repeating items (products, listings, etc.).

     * **Capture Text** : extract specific text elements from the page.

     * **Capture Screenshot** : save an image of the page.

For our Product Hunt example, we'll select **Capture List** to extract
multiple products.

![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1358898317/b3050fbb3a6f891657d5113a5868/hand-
pointing-right-03-stroke-rounded.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27hand-
pointing-right-03-stroke-
roundede670.png?expires=1771632000&signature=10400158f1d5c995478e90bc2aa5782d5d237fe1f6e714951075ea55ce13cd09&req=dSMiHsF3lYJeXvMW3Hu4gaG0Wi9a2o%2BMqKrhnE3xvwiEofGFQSP32oHeNC6g%0A2A%3D%3D%0A)
Remember: The robot will repeat every action that you take during the training
mode, so it is best to only perform scrolls and clicks when they are
necessary.

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1384579646/6c929f3ed781d9a4e6353ad98807/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27imagec161.png?expires=1771547400&signature=cfcd449db5494a3dfa3ce0bf4ef323d7f43eb557cc0f116a82c54a26b460ea94&req=dSMvEsx5lIdbX%2FMW1HO4zQXYobIZwXzYWwRItY6xUcz6Np6GJjmMxhkeSRKZ%0A1bXiFzb1TGD3VhVQUio%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1384579646/6c929f3ed781d9a4e6353ad98807/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27imagec161.png?expires=1771547400&signature=cfcd449db5494a3dfa3ce0bf4ef323d7f43eb557cc0f116a82c54a26b460ea94&req=dSMvEsx5lIdbX%2FMW1HO4zQXYobIZwXzYWwRItY6xUcz6Np6GJjmMxhkeSRKZ%0A1bXiFzb1TGD3VhVQUio%3D%0A)

## Step 5: Select and name your data points

After selecting **Capture List** you can now select the list you want to
extract:

  1. Move your mouse over the page and notice how the robot highlights different sections.

  2. When you see the correct list items highlighted (each product separated clearly), click to select it.

  3. Click on each specific data point you want to extract (title, description, upvotes, etc.).

  4. Press Enter after selecting all needed data points.

  5. Name each field (e.g., "Product Name", "Description", "Upvote Count").

![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1358919684/6efee7058d0f1cd728a0ccd06da2/idea-
stroke-rounded%20%25283%2529.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27idea-stroke-
rounded%2520%25283%25299435.png?expires=1771632000&signature=b4d625e4f91f2ec1eddb11ecadf3ab62af2f8703266e33c5579ccfb617bca8e1&req=dSMiHsB%2FlIdXXfMW3Hu4gVX11tcalpFE6ZzijcqDVz2IzY98iUtl0RT1ZFd6%0AaQ%3D%3D%0A)
**Tip:** You can use the **Esc** key to undo any changes to the data point
names.

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1358899307/a21f024f3a79f085deadec08131b/file-
BPJ7BRqtEj.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27file-
BPJ7BRqtEjdf44.gif?expires=1771547400&signature=3d23615b43b5b10d7888c87166fba5dea94ecc7ce51bea261e116a65cd29bbde&req=dSMiHsF3lIJfXvMW1HO4zRrBqMbmBL4y6Itf3WR5u7hVfd26me6ids71Rvn6%0AVTNgTjaOGf8c7ABpRvo%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1358899307/a21f024f3a79f085deadec08131b/file-
BPJ7BRqtEj.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27file-
BPJ7BRqtEjdf44.gif?expires=1771547400&signature=3d23615b43b5b10d7888c87166fba5dea94ecc7ce51bea261e116a65cd29bbde&req=dSMiHsF3lIJfXvMW1HO4zRrBqMbmBL4y6Itf3WR5u7hVfd26me6ids71Rvn6%0AVTNgTjaOGf8c7ABpRvo%3D%0A)

## Step 6: Configure your list settings

After naming your fields, you'll see a preview table of the captured data.
Now:

  1. Give your list a descriptive name (e.g., "Product Hunt Top Products").

  2. Set the maximum number of items to extract.

  3. Select the appropriate pagination type:

     * **Click next button** : for websites with next page buttons.

     * **Scroll down to load more** : for infinite scroll pages like Product Hunt.

     * **No pagination** : for single-page extractions.

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1384579922/551362de41c298c3f69fb5249715/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27imagee96c.png?expires=1771547400&signature=c8de35bf2ed5b14d3c20d792c3b58500ecac745be51af855e95e636b17d78221&req=dSMvEsx5lIhdW%2FMW1HO4zaMZOhtDya4epJsr1b7Ic6wPE5Kom0Q5uX03WekX%0A6dnUW2qP%2BhYI25Ma2Eg%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1384579922/551362de41c298c3f69fb5249715/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27imagee96c.png?expires=1771547400&signature=c8de35bf2ed5b14d3c20d792c3b58500ecac745be51af855e95e636b17d78221&req=dSMvEsx5lIhdW%2FMW1HO4zaMZOhtDya4epJsr1b7Ic6wPE5Kom0Q5uX03WekX%0A6dnUW2qP%2BhYI25Ma2Eg%3D%0A)

## Step 7: Finish and save your robot

  1. Review your captured data in the preview.

  2. Click **Capture List** to confirm.

  3. Click on the robot icon and select **Finish Recording.**

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1384580210/71560199939daac386f9d32dde66/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image7612.png?expires=1771547400&signature=45d996938eac35722bab772c547013dcdf70d4b85260d8a658bef33f996d7ce2&req=dSMvEsx2nYNeWfMW1HO4zdDMZbP%2BJPCSQNF0a8taw7CHkDXlQZINWaJc%2BqZ4%0AQpOfYAMKgxzRBjNgti4%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1384580210/71560199939daac386f9d32dde66/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image7612.png?expires=1771547400&signature=45d996938eac35722bab772c547013dcdf70d4b85260d8a658bef33f996d7ce2&req=dSMvEsx2nYNeWfMW1HO4zdDMZbP%2BJPCSQNF0a8taw7CHkDXlQZINWaJc%2BqZ4%0AQpOfYAMKgxzRBjNgti4%3D%0A)

## Step 8: Review and approve your robot

  1. Name your robot (e.g., "Product Hunt Top Products Tracker").

  2. Click **Save**.

  3. After saving, you'll see your extracted data.

  4. Verify that it looks correct and click **Yes, looks good**.

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1384580434/d927ea2432ddd4cacd2a81998653/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image52d3.png?expires=1771547400&signature=dee8f18cdbb5f2c0fb68e3b8090edea28f21760e6c96c5277fef46e458aa10de&req=dSMvEsx2nYVcXfMW1HO4zX7Jt1ficAAYdDFwZcW2CSYZz9rNeHQxf4RJzmwk%0AdH9vGglaYiYk8R%2F%2BwW4%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1384580434/d927ea2432ddd4cacd2a81998653/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27image52d3.png?expires=1771547400&signature=dee8f18cdbb5f2c0fb68e3b8090edea28f21760e6c96c5277fef46e458aa10de&req=dSMvEsx2nYVcXfMW1HO4zX7Jt1ficAAYdDFwZcW2CSYZz9rNeHQxf4RJzmwk%0AdH9vGglaYiYk8R%2F%2BwW4%3D%0A)

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1360223901/a7df8e44ccba4dd44514bd4ff5db/file-
xMscAhtEMK.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27file-
xMscAhtEMK83e1.gif?expires=1771547400&signature=1890989e96d5dc2ba9d6ff9a65052244466be6d8a2c69aebdc807c5a913e7a71&req=dSMhFst8nohfWPMW1HO4zdTcWnceHsl6P1PaxrKhV%2FYdM5PyhPgN8WVpd9Ws%0AAN8W0Vt65BwJYdixOic%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1360223901/a7df8e44ccba4dd44514bd4ff5db/file-
xMscAhtEMK.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27file-
xMscAhtEMK83e1.gif?expires=1771547400&signature=1890989e96d5dc2ba9d6ff9a65052244466be6d8a2c69aebdc807c5a913e7a71&req=dSMhFst8nohfWPMW1HO4zdTcWnceHsl6P1PaxrKhV%2FYdM5PyhPgN8WVpd9Ws%0AAN8W0Vt65BwJYdixOic%3D%0A)

# What else can you do?

Your new robot opens up several possibilities:

  * Download data: go to the **History** tab, find your task, and click **Download CSV.**

  * Run fresh extractions: visit the **Run Task** tab to extract updated data anytime.

  * [Set up a Bulk Run](10453933-bulk-run-how-to-use-bulk-runs-to-extract-data-from-multiple-urls.html): automatically extract data from up to 500,000 websites with the same structure.

  * [Set up monitoring](10535487-how-to-set-up-monitoring-for-website-changes.html): create a monitor to run your robot on a schedule and alert you to changes

  * [Integrate or create automations with your data](https://integ/): use our integrations to send data to your favorite tools and apps.

  * [Deep scrape](10459476-workflows-how-can-i-create-a-workflow-connecting-two-robots.html): build a second robot to extract detailed information from each item in your list.  
​**​**

How to train a robot to scrape or monitor data

# How to train a robot to scrape or monitor data

Train a robot to scrape or monitor web data from any website.

M

Written by Melissa Shires

Updated over 3 months ago

Table of contents

You can train a robot to extract, scrape or monitor any data from a website.  
​

Robots can be trained to:

  * Extract structured data from a web page.

  * Automatically scrape and structure a list of items.

  * Interact with a web page (ex: point, click, scroll) to scrape dynamic content.

  * Capture a screenshot of a page.

  * Paginate or infinite scroll to capture a full list.

💡 If you're looking to scrape or monitor data across multiple pages (deep
scraping), you'll need to create multiple robots and connect them together
using [workflows](10553465-how-to-extract-data-across-multiple-pages-deep-
scraping.html).

# How to start training your robot

To start training your robot, all you'll need is the URL you'd like to scrape
or monitor.

  1. From your Browse AI dashboard, click "Build New Robot".

  2. Select either:

    1. Extract structure data - if you'd like to scrape data from a web page (note: you can add a web monitor onto any robot).

    2. Monitor site changes - if you want to create a web monitor.

  3. Enter the Origin URL you would like to scrape or monitor.

  4. Click Start Training Robot.

  5. Select Use Robot Studio and wait for your web page to load.

📖 **What is the "Origin URL"?**

The [Origin URL](10453064-what-is-the-origin-url.html) is where you'd like to
start training your robot.

Note that it's best to get the robot to start training as close to the end
data as possible.

Example: start your robot at <https://www.ycombinator.com/companies> vs.
<https://www.ycombinator.com/> in this example.

If the page you want to scrape does not have a direct URL, once in Robot
Studio you can [search](10497039-can-my-robot-fill-out-a-form-or-perform-an-
action-before-extracting-data.html), [login](10518514-how-to-scrape-and-
monitor-data-behind-a-login.html), navigate, click or scroll to access the
content.

# How to train your robot to scrape or monitor basic text

Your website will be loaded into Robot Studio where you can train your robot
to capture text.

There are two ways to capture text:

  * From a list - choose this option if you're capturing a list on a page. 

  * Just text - choose this option to capture, label, and structure specific text elements on a page. 

You can train a robot to scrape, monitor and structure as much text as you'd
like (both from a list, and just text) across a single web page.

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1742628722/2546bb5f615b11d0fcee099ff3e7/file-4k7YVYoPYx.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27file-4k7YVYoPYx73ee.gif?expires=1771546500&signature=22740447d8af0687d7762d05dadc7b1a795f0c44838ffe2c6506d243d2930837&req=dScjFM98lYZdW%2FMW1HO4zXhOp5oQ4IzB%2BjrjXpoSeLMEUsD9cUszO8zBita5%0AyQ54U%2ByAUDA7872aumM%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1742628722/2546bb5f615b11d0fcee099ff3e7/file-4k7YVYoPYx.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27file-4k7YVYoPYx73ee.gif?expires=1771546500&signature=22740447d8af0687d7762d05dadc7b1a795f0c44838ffe2c6506d243d2930837&req=dScjFM98lYZdW%2FMW1HO4zXhOp5oQ4IzB%2BjrjXpoSeLMEUsD9cUszO8zBita5%0AyQ54U%2ByAUDA7872aumM%3D%0A)

## Scraping data 'From a list'

'From a list' is best for repeating information like product listings or
search results. By training your robot to scrape or extract the data from a
list, it will automatically structure the data into a table as well as trigger
pagination options.

  1. Click on Capture Text, and select From a list.

  2. Hover over the list of items on the page until you see a dotted outline around the elements you want to capture.

  3. Click to select the list when the outline matches your desired data set.

  4. Robot studio will automatically structure that data into a recommended dataset (you can customize this if needed, see below). 

  5. Give your list a descriptive name. 

  6. Select the number of items you'd like the robot to capture. 

  7. Configure the pagination settings to capture additional list items. These include:

    1. Clicking through 'next' buttons. 

    2. Click "load more items"

    3. Infinite scroll (i.e. scroll up or down to load additional items)

    4. No more items to load.

  8. Click 'Save Captured List'.

  9. Click 'Finish' to finish recording your robot if you've captured all of the data you need, or keep capturing text or screenshots.

### How to customize the scraped list data (optional)

If the automatically structured data doesn't meet your needs, you can also
customize the structure of the list data.

  1. Hover over each item you'd like to extract.

  2. Click to select them.

  3. When finished, click Confirm.

  4. Label each data point (press Enter after each one to move to the next).

From there follow the same steps as above to determine the number of list
items and pagination settings.

## Scraping 'Just text' to capture and structure text

If you want to scrape, extract or monitor specific text or elements from a
page, you'll want to capture 'Just text'. This feature lets you not only
extract specific elements, but also allows you to structure the data you're
scraping.

  1. Click 'Capture Text' and select 'Just text'.

  2. Hover and click to select what you want to capture.

  3. Select all text on the page you want to scrape or monitor by clicking on it.

  4. Click confirm when you're done.

  5. Label your captured text. Each label will be a column of data.

  6. Save the captured text.

  7. Click 'Finish' to finish recording your robot if you've captured all of the data you need, or keep capturing text or screenshots.

Note that when capturing, you can often choose between scraping the visible
text, HTML, or link depending on what you've selected.

# How to train your robot to capture a screenshot

In addition to scraping and monitoring content on a webpage, you can capture
screenshots.

There are three types of screenshots you can capture:

  * Selections: screenshot a specific part of a page. 

  * Entire page: capture the complete webpage.

  * Visible part: capture only what's currently visible without scrolling.

You can train a robot to capture screenshots, as well as text. You can also
train the same robot to capture multiple types of screenshots.

  1. Select Capture Screenshot.

  2. Choose which type of screenshot you'd like to capture.

  3. Name your screenshot. 

  4. Click 'Finish' to finish recording your robot if you've captured all of the data you need, or keep capturing text or screenshots.

# Editing during recording

Robot Studio allows you to modify your data extraction while recording.

## Removing a data point

  1. In the sidebar, hover over the data point you want to remove.

  2. Click the trash can icon to delete it.

  3. Confirm the change in the data preview table.

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1744309667/d2848eb775c659ea3908746f7981/file-

## Removing an entire list

  1. In the Output Data Preview table, hover over the list name.

  2. Click the trash can icon below the list name.

  3. Confirm the deletion when prompted.

# How to train your robot to scrape or monitor dynamic text

In addition to scraping or monitoring static HTML or text on a webpage, you
can also train your robot to capture dynamic content on a page.

To do so simply mimic what you would do navigating the content naturally
including:

  * Clicking, scrolling or navigating. 

  * Filling out forms, text fields, or search bars. 

  * Login in. 

Your robot will be trained to follow this behavior based on your recording.

# Approving your robot

When you've finished training your robot to scrape and capture all of the data
you need, you'll need to approve your robot.

  1. Click 'Finish Recording'.

  2. Give your robot a clear, descriptive name.

  3. Review the extracted data (note: this is a preview of what and how your robot has been trained to scrape and is not the full dataset).

  4. Choose from the options at the bottom of the screen:

     * **Yes, looks good** to approve your robot.

     * **No, let me re-train the robot** to start over.

     * **No, report an issue** instantly trigger a ticket to our support team.

     * **Delete this robot** to remove it completely.

Once your robot is approved, you'll be able to configure monitoring,
workflows, integrations, export the data, and more.

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1787597896/b9a86170c6e65b0cc33241b6bbe9/How%20to%20Approve%20a%20Robot%20%25282%2529.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27How%2520to%2520Approve%2520a%2520Robot%2520%25282%252943be.gif?expires=1771546500&signature=31d58647f0ae829f2f107f28c7cf521aaf713043729a4707297b274f75183634&req=dScvEcx3molWX%2FMW1HO4zTIy%2Fk3G%2BA1OCRKi6PYh1lTo5HnrOAcV%2Bmzjhwac%0AKW2hSCokLPZHpRK1E8s%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1787597896/b9a86170c6e65b0cc33241b6bbe9/How%20to%20Approve%20a%20Robot%20%25282%2529.gif_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27How%2520to%2520Approve%2520a%2520Robot%2520%25282%252943be.gif?expires=1771546500&signature=31d58647f0ae829f2f107f28c7cf521aaf713043729a4707297b274f75183634&req=dScvEcx3molWX%2FMW1HO4zTIy%2Fk3G%2BA1OCRKi6PYh1lTo5HnrOAcV%2Bmzjhwac%0AKW2hSCokLPZHpRK1E8s%3D%0A)

Can you build a robot to extract emails and phone numbers?

# Can you build a robot to extract emails and phone numbers?

Train a robot to extract visible contact information from websites, but not to
search or scrape hidden emails or phone numbers.

M

Written by Melissa Shires

Updated over 12 months ago

Table of contents

# What email and phone data can I extract?

You can create a robot to extract emails or phone numbers that are clearly
displayed on a website. This works well when:

  * The contact information is already visible on the page

  * You need to organize this information into a structured format

  * You want to monitor for changes to the displayed contact details

For example, you might build a robot to extract publicly available contact
information from a business directory where the information is meant to be
accessed.  
​

[![](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1380987171/6eda41f8da293460df3c73b4865f/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27imagee220.png?expires=1771547400&signature=fcc473d14c68274fda15b11abd0c8cfeec57cb537455de5ccd98230517e668ab&req=dSMvFsB2moBYWPMW1HO4zWqpyqj%2B4QVZegVuEJSpOxVTk1dl2fhdZYSSwXfv%0A4XN4EPkuCFPLRwSprfc%3D%0A)](../../../downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/bcyfauog/1380987171/6eda41f8da293460df3c73b4865f/image.png_%3b%20filename_%3dUTF-8%27%27imagee220.png?expires=1771547400&signature=fcc473d14c68274fda15b11abd0c8cfeec57cb537455de5ccd98230517e668ab&req=dSMvFsB2moBYWPMW1HO4zWqpyqj%2B4QVZegVuEJSpOxVTk1dl2fhdZYSSwXfv%0A4XN4EPkuCFPLRwSprfc%3D%0A)

# What data is unavailable to be extracted from Browse AI?

Browse AI isn't designed to:

  * Search websites to automatically discover hidden contact information

  * Extract emails or phone numbers from social media profiles

  * Scrape employee contacts from company websites without permission

  * Find customer contact details from competitor websites

These limitations exist both for technical reasons and to ensure responsible
data practices.

# Legal and ethical considerations

When extracting contact information, always ensure you:

  * Have permission to collect the data

  * Follow each website's terms of service

  * Comply with privacy regulations like GDPR and CCPA

  * Use the extracted data in accordance with relevant laws
